item.title: Anyone still play Age of Empires 2?
item.description:
I've been craving a replay of this old game recently. Bit cumbersome in places, but holds up surprisingly well where it counts.
Ballistics was such a big upgrade once you build a University
War Pachyderms are forever my favorite.
I played the game for probably +10 years and only found this out 2 months ago.
Technically it wasn't his faith that saved him, but he did do a lot of chanting.
item.dc:creator: ryry1237

item.dc:creator: Janinonsti

item.title: Big Bullshit Bill
item.description: I'm having a lot of conflicting feelings about July 4th and its related festivities. I'm not proud of where the US is right now, and I'm not proud of where we're heading. Especially with the Big Bullshit Bill passing... I love our country, and hate to see it all fucked up like it is, so I was trying to think of something I could do to show that. This year, I don't plan to wear red, white, or blue. I'm going to wear a black shirt and shorts, and don't plan to accessorize. I feel like the most American thing I can do is my own mini-protest and bring attention to where we are in the world. I pulled my first "I don't get it," with my MAGA idiot brother in law. It was titled "best gender reveal," and someone threw a water balloon at a trans woman and her wig flew off. Hopefully staged, but the intent was clear. I was like... I don't get it... "... because they're dressing like a woman... So gender?" "Oh, sorry. I just don't think it's funny to make fun of a group of marginalized people."
item.dc:creator: freakwaph

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 218
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Dump of city planning/transpo memes
item.description:
70% of microplastics are from tires and brakes.
I love my e-bike, I can't recommend it enough.
Tell your city council to eliminate all parking mandates, and let the free market decide the demand and supply.
A better world is possible. Look at Paris lately!
Sprawl is a huge reason why many cities struggle financially.
Something nice before you leave.
item.dc:creator: ShinyVulvasaur

item.title: What Happened Today #154
item.description: ? The megabill passed to no one's surprise. I look at America in the hours after and see migrants in shipping containers waiting to be jailed in a third country, federal agents found urinating in a high school parking lot in broad daylight, and diplomats being required to take show fidelity to Donald Trump, not the United States. This is America today. The megabill just pays for it by taking money from the disabled, the elderly, the poor, and anyone not earning a substantial income. We link to Mobilize every day. Go there today, find a local event you can attend soon, and let's start taking back our communities so that we can take back our country. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at gov brief dot today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/what-bill-changes 2. https://go.govbrief.today/marines-deploying-florida 3. https://go.govbrief.today/us-too-many-weapons 4. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-suspends-employees-letter 5. https://go.govbrief.today/america-beautiful-again 6. https://go.govbrief.today/missouri-judge-lifts-abortion-ban 7. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-south-sudan-deportations 8. https://go.govbrief.today/uc-ban-israel-boycott 9. https://go.govbrief.today/may25-jobs-report 10. https://go.govbrief.today/labor-dept-cuts-protections 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-claims-nullify-law-power 12. https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-urinates-closed-school-daytime 13. https://go.govbrief.today/court-democratic-flra-fired 14. https://go.govbrief.today/state-dept-fidelity-test 15. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-post-harassing 16. https://go.govbrief.today/ufc-white-house 17. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-move-space-shuttle Yesterday's Top - https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-hacked-politics Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/planned-parenthood-suing Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com ** Imgur Reminder** - I no longer have access to private chat here. :(
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: David Suzuki, climate activist, says politics and diplomacy have failed.
item.description:
Suzuki is unequivocal that climate change is a very real and pressing problem and that an "overwhelming majority of scientists" now agree that human activity is responsible.
The Trump administration's climate change policy is largely characterized by a rollback of environmental regulations, a focus on increasing fossil fuel production, and withdrawal from international climate agreements. A key aspect was the dismantling of regulations aimed at limiting greenhouse gas emissions, particularly from power plants, and a push to revive the coal industry.
https://finland.fi/business-innovation/it-all-adds-up-how-finnish-towns-are-taking-action-against-climate-change/
“Think global, act local” takes on a whole new meaning.
item.dc:creator: sintares3000
